abilities.name: Breakthrough Research
abilities.text: After an allied peon within 6" is killed, infuse a (soulstone).

abilities.name: Protected (Cadmus)
abilities.text: After an enemy model targets this model, this model may discard a card. If it does so, a friendly Cadmus model within 2" suffers any effects generated by that action.

actions.name: Alchemical Blast
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has a Poison token, this model adds a suit of its choice to its duel total.
actions.effects: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (r)1" of the target.

triggers.name: Playthings
triggers.text: After killing the target, summon an Eyes and Ears in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Carrier
triggers.text: Models damaged by this action gain a Parasite token.

triggers.name: Wide Vector
triggers.text: When resolving, increase the range of any generated (r) effects by +1".

actions.name: A Fungus Among Us
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Friendly Eyes and Ears only.
actions.effects: Replace the target with a Cadmus minion. Then, the new model heals 4 and gains a Summon token.

actions.name: Healing Energy
actions.effects: Target heals 2. For each raise this action receives, the target heals an additional +2.

triggers.name: Keep Your Distance
triggers.text: Move enemy models within (r)1" of the target 2" away from the target.
